data.body: REPLAN_ESCALATE: DD5 for this story requires adding a NEVER statement referencing 'plugins/dso/' inside ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md, which is a distributed plugin file. Hardcoding the host-project install path 'plugins/dso/' in a distributed artifact is architecturally wrong — other host projects install the plugin at their own path. Reverted commit a141d296 which added the flawed prohibition. DD5 cannot be satisfied as written; story needs brainstorm-level re-examination to use host-agnostic language (e.g., '$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT' or relative plugin path conventions) instead of hardcoded 'plugins/dso/'.
